- Goal model: Move the blue rectangle into/onto the yellow structures at the bottom.
- Action model: LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN move the blue rectangle by 4 cells in the respective direction. Each action costs 2 timer units.

end of world model.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# First, move blue rect back to original position (UP once)
# Then try SPACE to see what it does
result = action(['UP'])
print("After UP:", last_action_result)

seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        print(f"Blue rect: boundary={n['boundary']}")
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"Green bar: pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Now try SPACE
result2 = action(['SPACE'])
print("\nAfter SPACE:", last_action_result)

seg2 = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
for n in seg2:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        print(f"Blue rect: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        print(f"Green bar: pixels={n['pixels']}")
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        print(f"Yellow: boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
